name: Barbara Morrison
abstract: Barbara Morrison (September 10, 1949 – March 16, 2022) was an American jazz singer.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: The Johnny Otis Show
Harold Arlen Centennial Celebration
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Burrell
about_quotes.evidence: I called and it wasn’t a lot of money, but these people were interested in teaching... Barbara Morrison, Ruth Price, and Michelle Weir were the three... I was also one of the vocal instructors at the time.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Burrell — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
